titleStmt.title: SII 41.235: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 235. (A.R. No. 454 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

p.hi: Vijayanagar, Dēvarāya-Mahārāya Śaka 1357, Rākshasa, Kaṉṉi, Purva 10, Monday, Thiruvōṉam = 1435, Sept. 5.

summary.p: Incomplete. Sale of land by the trustees of Tiruvalangadudaiya-Nāyanār temple at Paḻaiyanūr in Mēlmalai-Paḻaiyanūr-nāḍu, a sub-division of Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam to an individual called Mallukāchchiṉar son of Kevura Aṇṇagaḷ of Chimittirikkal in Pāṇḍiya-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Irājātiirāca Irācaparameśvara śrīvīrapratābha tevarāya mahāirāyarkku pritiviirācciyam cellāniṉṟa sakāpdam Āyirattu munūṟṟu Aypattueḻil mel cellā niṉṟa Irākṣata samvaṟsarattu kaṉni nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tecamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu vaṭakarai maṇaviṟ koṭṭattu melmalaip paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭu paḻaiyaṉūr Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaraṉ Aruḷāl Ikkoyil
tāṉattārom pāṇṭiyanāṭṭu cimittirikkallil taṉañciya kottirattu rukkucāykai kevuraaṇṇakaḷ makaṉār mallukācciṉar tevarkku Iṟaiili vilaipramāṇam paṇṇi kuṭuttapaṭi tiruppaḻaiyaṉūr śrīpaṇṭārap pātiyil vaṭa kaḻaṉi Oḻukiṉpaṭi viṣappaṭṭi kuḻi [6 10] Iṭaiyceṟu kuḻi 6 10 Iṭaikuṇṭil kapātiyil kuḻi vaṭakkil Iṭaiyikuḻikku maḻapaṭṭikuḻi 7 10 pakaitīraṉkuḻikkumeṟpaṭi ceṟukuḻikku ceṟu 41 Āka kuḻi5 100 Ikkuḻiañ
Digital edition of SII 41.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
